66 E1F E1F_UNREAL_FEARS 21f(E1f)Expression of Unrealistic Fears CHAR 1 Indicates the frequency of unrealistic fears the patient expressed. Examples are fear of being abandoned, left alone, being with others. -1 = Unknown, -2 = Space, 0 = Indicator not exhitied in last 30 days, 1 = Indicator
